ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_number" INTEGER /* Match number in the series */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the match took place */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "won_by" TEXT /* How the match was won (runs, wickets) */,
  "scorecard_url" TEXT /* URL to the full scorecard */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed) */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue" TEXT /* Home venue of the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., opening batsman, middle-order, all-rounder) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., right-hand, left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spinner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets lost by the team */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Total extras (byes, leg byes, wides, no-balls) */,
  "partnerships" TEXT /* Key partnerships and their runs */,
  "fall_of_wickets" TEXT /* Fall of wickets with overs and players */,
  "umpire_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_referee_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_umpire_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_2_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_umpire_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_1_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total balls faced by the player */,
  "ball_type" TEXT /* Type of ball (e.g., fast, spin) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Batting strike rate */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Bowling economy rate */,
  "four" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "six" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the media file is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "file_duration" REAL /* Duration of the media file (for videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
